data.description:
Repro (verified on installed 0.4.0, temp store): rebar.clarity_check("deadbeefdeadbeef") -> {"output": "ERROR: failed to retrieve ticket ...", "passed": false} — violates clarity_result.schema.json (no score/verdict/threshold) and over MCP raises ToolError: 3 validation errors for ClarityResultOut. Sibling gates are consistent: check_ac -> {"verdict":"fail","criteria_count":0,"reason":"could not load ...","passed":false}.

Source: src/rebar/__init__.py:178-183 (fallback dict shape); mcp_server.py:211-214 (ClarityResultOut model rejects it).

Expected: a clean ticket-not-found error (RebarError -> ToolError, like show_ticket) OR a schema-conforming fail result — consistent across all three gates and across library/MCP. RED test: all three gates on a nonexistent id; assert one consistent error contract through library and MCP.
data.title: clarity_check returns schema-violating {output,...} shape on missing ticket; siblings degrade properly
